title: Filter columns in My Work

posts.author: JohnG (John)
posts.cookedHtml: When running multiple project, across multiple boards, the My Work page is a solution for viewing all the tasks for a selection of boards. It would be helpful to be able to filter the columns of the My Work page, so as to drill down on a specific status of a task such as “Working on it” or “Up next” etc. The only other solution is to categorise tasks by date - not everyone applies dates to their tasks!
